changelog: Memory system enhancements (R-A inbox pattern: agents flag candidates to docs/.output/memories/_inbox/, Main Agent curates via memory-manager-cli.js inbox-list/promote/discard; two-surface protocol split — agents own flagging, Main Agent owns curation), R-D /interview Step 7 promotes durable cross-project decisions directly to memory at session-close (closes Issue #44326 elicitation-hook gap at the application layer), R-B new /review:memory-defrag command (Sonnet analyzes overlap clusters, Main Agent executes merges/splits/cross-refs; new memory-manager.js deleteMemory API), R-C memory-extractor.js rewritten to Mem0 v2-aligned single-pass shape with schema unified with the inbox JSON shape (adopters can pipe extractor output to _inbox/ for one curation flow). Plus: R7 PostToolUse tool-output secret-scanner hook (warn-only — Claude Code 2.x does not honor hookSpecificOutput.updatedToolOutput today; hook retained for forward-compat), R10 scaffold --set <key>=<value> for non-interactive substitution, R1 /interview Limitations section documenting AskUserQuestion elicitation-hook gap, R2 /run-tests /loop wrapper guidance. Net test count 1295 → 1319.
